<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Strategy; interface StrategyResolverInterface { /** * Resolves subcommand strategy. * * @param string $commandId * @param string $subcommandId * @return SubcommandStrategyInterface */ public function resolve(string $commandId, string $subcommandId): SubcommandStrategyInterface; }
